message:
refactor(abi): migrate tgkill, pidfd_getfd, execveat, statx, mknod, sigqueue to native syscalls

Replace libc::syscall with frankenlibc_core::syscall wrappers:
- tgkill: sys_tgkill
- pidfd_getfd: sys_pidfd_getfd
- execveat: sys_execveat
- statx: sys_statx
- mknod/mkfifoat/mknodat: sys_mknodat
- sigqueue: sys_rt_sigqueueinfo
- getdtablesize/sysconf: sys_getrlimit

Reduces libc::syscall calls from 140 to 129.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
